title: Understanding Why Language Models Hallucinate: Testing Reasoning Against Priors
abstract: This tool provides in-depth insights into why language models generate incorrect or nonsensical responses, equipping users with the knowledge to improve model reliability and prompt formulation.
abstract_zh: 这工具超级牛逼，不仅能让你知道为啥语言模型答非所问或者胡说八道，还能让你学会怎么提高模型的准确性和指令的质量，简直是一把神奇的钥匙！
